name: International Modern Hospital
message: International Modern Hospital (IMH) (established in 2005) is the oldest private hospital in north Dubai. IMH is a tertiary multi-specialty hospital - the modern facilities include a total of 117 beds (with 4 VIP suites), 5 fully equipped operating theatres plus an endoscopy suite, intensive care facilities, oncology and dialysis wards and rehabilitation & physiotherapy services. International Modern Hospital is located in Sheikh Rashid Rd, Dubai, Dubai, 121735, United Arab Emirates and has 484 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 1.45 TB
